title: Amphineuron kiauense

This family is part of the order Polypodiales, which includes many species of ferns. The class of Amphineuron kiauense is Polypodiopsida, a class of vascular plants that belong to the division Pteridophyta. The division Pteridophyta includes all ferns and fern allies, and is a part of the kingdom Plantae. Amphineuron kiauense is also a part of the phylum Tracheophyta, which includes all vascular plants.

This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, where it is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate conditions such as arthritis and reduce oxidative stress.
